span.p:
SDM_TYPE_ROM
Inicializado no reset:
32 sets → 2'b01 SRRIP
32 sets → 2'b10 BRRIP
resto → 2'b00 follower

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
sdm_type == 01
→ SRRIP
sdm_type == 10
→ BRRIP
sdm_type == 00
→ psel[9]

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PSEL_REG
reset = 0
0 → SRRIP wins
1023 → BRRIP wins
limiar = 511
bit[9]=0 → SRRIP
bit[9]=1 → BRRIP

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PSEL_UPDATE
────────────────────
SRRIP-SDM miss → psel++
BRRIP-SDM miss → psel--
follower miss → sem mudança
(saturante nos limites 0/1023)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BIP_INSERT_CTRL
────────────────────
bip_cnt++ a cada miss BRRIP
a cada 32 misses: LONG_RRPV
demais: MAX_RRPV

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
